description: All functions (full_adder, add4, negate4, sub4) return correct outputs for all test cases
Does not use Python keywords 'and', 'or', 'not', 'if'; does not use + or - operators
full_adder is built from two half_adders + OR; add4 chains four full_adders; sub4 uses negate4 + add4
Clear variable names (s0/c0, s1/c1, etc.) that show the signal flow through the ripple-carry chain
